column1: Is that my milkshake or yours milkshake?
Look where the dog has put its bone!
I haven't got a camera with me because I've lent mine to my brother.
Your DVD player is just the same as theirs is.
Was it your decision or hers decision?
You can borrow my laptop, but why aren't you using yours laptop?
I think those are your CDs and these are ours.
This is her book, these are your books and these two are mine books.
That video belongs to Carol and Doug - at least, I think it's theirs video.
